news.summary: BTC has reached a new all-time high of $111,000 and is showing potential for a golden cross for the first time since October. The funding rates on major cryptocurrencies remain low, with BTC's open interest on Deribit hitting a record $42.5 billion. One hyperliquid whale has increased their BTC position to $1.1 billion, while miners were observed to have dumped BTC right before the ATH. HYPE has led a rally in Layer 1 blockchains, nearing their ATH. Cetus on SUI has faced an exploit, while IBIT is now in the top 5 for YTD inflows across all ETFs. VanEck is set to launch a private digital asset fund in June, and Binance is listing the WLFI stablecoin. SOL Mobile's 2nd Gen Seeker will start shipping on August 4. WLD has raised $135 million from VCs for expansion, while Synthetix has dropped a $27 million Derive deal. Hong Kong has passed a stablecoin bill, and there may have been a Coinbase leak in December. The FOMO HOUR podcast covers these updates and more in the crypto and macro spheres.
news.headline: BTC breaches new ATH of $111k, Texas passes BTC bill, InfoFi battle erupts. Major updates in cryptocurrency and macro spheres on FOMO HOUR.

news.summary: Sciaky Inc., a Chicago-based company, has recently disclosed the delivery of the initial large Electron Beam Welding (EBW) Machine to overseas clients. The VX-300 Electron Beam Welding machine was shipped in May 2025, with two more similar machines set to follow. This development marks a significant milestone for Sciaky Inc. in their global operations.
news.headline: Sciaky ships first of three large EBW machines to overseas customers, starting with VX-300 EB welding machine in May 2025.

The donation, estimated at 10.5 billion tenge, forms part of the Foundation's ongoing efforts to assist the community.
news.headline: Bulat Utemuratov Foundation gifts 500 apartments to Astana, worth 10.5 billion tenge, aiding families in need.

news.summary: Consolidated Communications Holdings, LLC revealed the completion of its first fiber securitization deal totaling $1.344 billion. The transaction involved issuing asset-backed term notes (referred to as the “Notes”) secured by current and future fiber-enabled customers in specific states, along with the fiber optic and network infrastructure serving these customers. Simultaneously with the Notes offering, the company also...

news.summary: The report on the Colorado legal cannabis market reveals that in 2024, it was valued at USD 2.59 billion and is estimated to grow to USD 5.53 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.90%. The analysis covers various aspects such as sources (marijuana, hemp), derivatives (CBD, THC), cultivation methods (indoor, greenhouse), and end uses (recreational, medical). This data has been made available by ResearchAndMarkets.com, showcasing the significant growth prospects within the Colorado legal cannabis industry from 2025 to 2030.
news.headline: Colorado legal cannabis market valued at $2.59bn in 2024, projected to reach $5.53bn by 2030 at a CAGR of 12.90%.

news.summary: The shareholders have given their approval for the proposed dividend of 1.44 Euros per share, showing a substantial 21% raise from the previous year. This marks the highest dividend ever declared in the company's history, reflecting positive growth and financial performance. The ongoing successful implementation of the company's transformation and turnaround strategies is further solidifying its base for future development.
news.headline: Fresenius Medical Care AGM sees highest dividend per share at 1.44 Euro, up 21% from last year, reflecting strong performance.

news.summary: The National Credit Union Foundation, acting as the charitable arm of the credit union movement, revealed Catie McDonald as the new Chief in a recent announcement on May 22, 2025, in MADISON, Wis. This move is part of the foundation's dedication to enhancing financial well-being for all.
news.headline: National Credit Union Foundation appoints Catie McDonald as Chief Impact Officer to enhance financial well-being for all.

news.summary: New information will be presented at ASCO on June 1, 2025, regarding the 24-month follow-up data from a randomized Phase I segment of the Phase I/II trial of TG4050. This trial focuses on individuals with resected locally advanced head and neck cancer. The data being shared is significant as it provides insights into the long-term outcomes of participants in the trial. Such information is crucial in assessing the efficacy of TG4050 in this particular patient population. This presentation highlights the progress in understanding the impact of this treatment, indicating potential advancements in managing this type of cancer.
news.headline: Transgene to share 24-month Disease-Free Survival Data from All Patients in Phase I Trial of Cancer Vaccine TG4050 at ASCO 2025.

news.summary: On 22nd May 2025, Roche disclosed the approval of Susvimo® (ranibizumab injection) 100 mg/mL by the US FDA for diabetic retinopathy (DR) treatment. DR, a sight-threatening ailment, impacts nearly 10 million individuals in the US and over 100 million globally. This is the sole FDA-endorsed continuous delivery therapy that has exhibited the maintenance of vision in DR patients with just a single refill required every nine months. Susvimo is now accessible to US retina specialists and their DR patients who have positively responded to a minimum of two anti-vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF) injections.
news.headline: FDA approves Roche’s Susvimo for diabetic retinopathy, affecting 10M in US and 100M globally. Offers one refill every 9 months.

Mindr reaffirms its support for veterans, active duty members, and their families. In an effort to show its commitment, Mindr has announced plans to hire a significant number of individuals this year...

news.summary: Miami-based Arcadia Capital, a top strategic advisor and investment bank catering to technology and software industry leaders, recently acted as the sole financial advisor to Conquer. Conquer, a company backed by Camden Partners, successfully acquired Full Circle Insights, which was previously under Scaleworks. This acquisition marks the union of two industry frontrunners to establish the pioneering Salesforce-native closed-loop engagement platform. The platform will seamlessly combine marketing attribution, funnel analytics, and various other functionalities to enhance operations.
news.headline: Arcadia Capital advised Conquer on acquiring Full Circle Insights, creating a Salesforce-native engagement platform.

news.summary: In Redondo Beach, California, and Luxembourg, Impulse Space, a prominent in-space mobility provider, has joined forces with SES, a global content and connectivity company. The two companies have unveiled a significant multi-launch agreement. This collaboration will involve utilizing Impulse's cutting-edge Helios kick stage to accelerate the process of positioning SES's chosen satellites into their designated final orbital locations. These satellites will be moved from Low Earth Orbit (LEO) to high-energy orbits within hours, significantly reducing the time needed for deployment in either geostationary (GEO) or Medium Earth Orbit (MEO). This partnership marks a strategic move aimed at enhancing satellite deployment efficiency and speed.
news.headline: SES & Impulse Space sign agreement for Helios Transport Services, aiming to transport satellites from LEO to GEO/MEO in hours.

news.summary: Antwerp, May 22, 2025 - Global company CMB.TECH NV (NYSE: CMBT, Euronext: CMBT) has confirmed that during the General Meeting of Shareholders, the annual accounts for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, were endorsed. Additionally, all other resolutions put forth by CMB.TECH’s Supervisory Board have been accepted.
news.headline: CMB.TECH NV's general meeting approves annual accounts for 2024, all resolutions by Supervisory Board also approved.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Silvercrest Asset Management Group (NASDAQ: SAMG) revealed the selection of Van Martin as the new Head of U.S. Consultant Relations. In his new position, Martin will be responsible for supervising the company’s efforts to enhance collaborations with both new and established institutional investors. His duties will include fostering stronger relationships with consultants, as well as driving the expansion of Silvercrest's institutional business in the U.S.
news.headline: Silvercrest Asset Management Group appoints Van Martin as Head of U.S. Consultant Relations, aimed at expanding institutional business growth.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the government has allocated $10 million in funding for a new initiative aimed at tackling homelessness in urban areas. The program is set to provide support to over 500 individuals who are currently living on the streets. Additionally, authorities plan to construct 200 new shelters to accommodate those in need. The initiative is part of a larger effort to address the growing issue of homelessness in cities across the country. The government hopes that this funding will make a meaningful impact and help improve the lives of those experiencing homelessness.
news.headline: AGI reveals plan to offer $75M in senior subordinated unsecured debentures, reaffirms 2025 outlook.

news.summary: In the autumn of 2026, The Tile Shop is set to introduce a special tile line created in collaboration with renowned designer Nate Berkus. This exclusive collection will comprise of timeless tile designs in traditional colors intended for both floors and walls.
news.headline: The Tile Shop to introduce Nate Berkus exclusive tile collection in fall 2026, featuring timeless designs in classic hues.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, the lowest it has been in the past 50 years. Additionally, the economy added 266,000 jobs in the last month, surpassing economists' predictions. This increase in job growth has been attributed to gains in the healthcare, manufacturing, and transportation sectors. The strong labor market continues to drive economic growth and maintain consumer confidence. The stock market also saw a positive response to this news, with major indices reaching new record highs. Experts remain cautiously optimistic about the future economic outlook, as global economic uncertainties still pose potential risks.
news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. makes headway with quantum-enhanced imaging deriving from nonlocal effects, boosting efficiency by 20%.

news.summary: Sports.com has formed a strategic partnership with the current development champion of INDYCAR, which will see their branding featured on the champion's helmet. This collaboration has propelled Sports.com into the global motorsport arena, reaching a vast audience of racing enthusiasts worldwide. The partnership highlights the commitment of Sports.com to expand its presence in the motorsport industry and capitalize on the exposure provided by the reigning champion's success. This landmark deal solidifies Sports.com as a prominent player in the motorsport sponsorship landscape, leveraging the widespread popularity and visibility of the INDYCAR series.
news.headline: Sports.com partners with INDYCAR champion Louis Foster, car No. 45, at 2025 Indy 500 for global brand exposure.

news.summary: Members of Priority Pass now have the opportunity to utilize extra soothing and efficient services at various airports across the United States. This offering aims to enhance the travel experience for members, who can now access a wider range of amenities and treatments while waiting for their flights. The expansion includes a significant number of new options for members, allowing them to relax and save time before their journeys.
news.headline: Xpres Spa offers new wellness benefits for Priority Pass members at U.S. airports, enhancing travel experience.

news.summary: After initial talks between SKEL fjárfestingafélag hf. and Samkaup hf., discussions were held about merging Samkaup with Orkan IS ehf. and Atlaga ehf. (previously known as Heimkaup). Subsequently, further negotiations took place with Kaupfélag Suðurnesja svf., the top shareholder in Samkaup, to restart talks under revised conditions. In December, all parties agreed on merging Atlaga and Samkaup. This merger deal obtained approval from competition authorities in April.
news.headline: SKEL buys shares in Samkaup; merger with Orkan IS and Atlaga; agreement reached in Dec; approval received in April.

news.summary: A new study revealed that over 1,200 people in the local area are currently jobless, with unemployment rates reaching 7%. The study also found that the top reasons for unemployment were lack of available jobs in desired industries and inadequate qualifications. The report suggested that developing new job opportunities and providing training programs could help reduce the unemployment rate in the region. Additionally, statistics showed that 60% of job seekers have been unemployed for more than six months, highlighting the need for urgent intervention. The study emphasized the importance of collaboration between local businesses, educational institutions, and government agencies to address the issue effectively.
news.headline: Is it necessary for managers to have individual meetings with every team member?

news.summary: In Vienna, Virginia on May 22, 2025, the U.S.-Saudi Business Council announced the launch of a new initiative following the formal establishment of the Strategic Partnership Initiative between the Governments of Saudi Arabia and the United States. This partnership aims to promote economic cooperation and is a significant step towards strengthening ties between the two countries. The council is delighted to introduce this initiative, which signifies a commitment to fostering stronger business relations.
news.headline: U.S.-Saudi Business Council launches Strategic Partnership Center to boost bilateral business & investment post formal agreement.

news.summary: In Flint, Michigan, a gathering of educators, researchers, families, and philanthropic supporters took place to further the cause of providing top-notch early childhood education to all children. The event, held on May 22, 2025, in Detroit, saw the participation of individuals committed to this mission. Educare, a prominent network of schools across the country, focuses on revolutionizing early childhood education. The gathering aimed to enhance the educational experiences of youngsters.
news.headline: Educare Network convenes 250 leaders in Flint, Michigan to advance early childhood education. Detroit, May 22, 2025.

news.summary: Ahead of the upcoming Unreal Fest Orlando, the game studio Ramen VR has introduced Aura, a groundbreaking AI assistant designed for Unreal Engine. Developers can now join the closed pre-alpha phase by submitting their applications. The announcement was made in San Francisco on May 22, 2025, showcasing a trailer for Aura. This marks a significant milestone for Ramen VR as they invite developers to be part of this innovative project.
news.headline: Ramen VR introduces AI tool Aura for Unreal Engine, invites developers to closed pre-alpha. debut ahead of Unreal Fest.

news.summary: Shannon Bream from FOX News Media has been selected to lead the conversation at an event jointly organized by the Kennedy Institute and the Orrin G. Hatch Foundation. This news was revealed on May 22, 2025. The Edward M. Kennedy Institute for the United States Senate and the Orrin G. Hatch Foundation disclosed that the sixth edition of the event will take place soon.
news.headline: Senators Fetterman and McCormick join Senate Project Series at Kennedy Institute, moderated by Shannon Bream.

news.summary: In Hellerup, Denmark, on May 22, 2025, TORM plc revealed positive news regarding its shares listed on Nasdaq under ticker symbols TRMD and TRMD A. The announcement followed a recent court order from the High Court of Justice in England and Wales on May 13, 2025. The order confirmed the reduction of the share premium, marking a significant development for the company.
news.headline: TORM plc (Nasdaq: TRMD) to reduce share premium following court order on May 13, 2025.
